Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-02 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data reveals two exceptional performers dominating the long-term momentum rankings. CLMT ranks #1 with a score of 93.0, showing consistent acceleration across timeframes (7.21% in 1 month scaling to 931.71% over 10 years) and passing all five momentum ratio thresholds with a "strong_buy" signal. MRVL displays even more extreme returns, particularly its stunning 2,828% 10-year return and 5.6x ratio from 5-year to 10-year performance, though with only 3 ratio passes and a partially visible dataset. Both stocks trade above all major moving averages (SMA 30/50/100/200), indicating sustained uptrends, but CLMT's outperformance versus SPY (129.42% over 1 year) appears more moderate than MRVL's 354.25% relative gain, suggesting different risk profiles and volatility characteristics. The negative momentum signal (-0.17) on CLMT combined with its "clean" flag and normal volatility suggests the current strength is well-supported rather than speculative.
